events.title: Iran Conducts Asymmetric Counterair Campaign Against US Assets
events.desc: Iranian drones and missiles struck Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia, destroying an E-3 Sentry and damaging multiple KC-135 tankers. This is part of a sustained counterair campaign by Iran against US and Israeli forces.
events.location: Prince Sultan Air Base, Saudi Arabia

events.title: Iranian Mines Allegedly Scattered Over Village Near Shiraz
events.desc: Evidence suggests the US deployed Gator Scatterable Mines over the village of Kafari near Shiraz. Iranian media reported casualties, and experts identified the munitions as US-made anti-tank mines, indicating potential US involvement in mining operations within Iran.

events.title: Iranian Strikes Hit IRGC Compound and Adjacent School in Minab
events.desc: Newly verified videos reveal two waves of missile strikes on an IRGC compound and a nearby school in Minab. The attacks, released by Iran's Ministry of Foreign Affairs, show multiple impacts on the complex, highlighting the evolving kinetic engagements in the conflict.

events.title: US Warships Clear Mines in Strait of Hormuz Amid Tensions
events.desc: Two US Navy warships entered the Strait of Hormuz to clear Iranian-laid mines, a move denied by Tehran, which threatened severe retaliation. This action follows President Trump's announcement of clearing operations.

events.title: Israeli Airstrike Kills Six at Gaza Police Checkpoint
events.desc: An Israeli airstrike targeted a police checkpoint in Bureij camp, central Gaza Strip, resulting in at least six deaths and multiple injuries. The Israeli military has not yet commented.

events.title: Israeli Strikes Hit Southern Lebanon and Beirut Suburbs After Ceasefire
events.desc: Despite a US-Iran ceasefire announcement, Israel launched significant strikes across Lebanon, impacting southern suburbs of Beirut, southern Lebanon, and the eastern Bekaa Valley. This action has been called a 'grave violation' by Iran.

events.title: Palestinian Shot Dead by Israeli Settlers in West Bank
events.desc: A Palestinian was killed during an attack by Israeli settlers in an occupied West Bank village. The incident occurs amidst warnings from former security chiefs about 'government-sponsored Jewish terrorism'.

events.title: Lebanon Continues Flights from Beirut Airport Amidst Israeli Bombing
events.desc: Beirut's airport remains operational despite ongoing Israeli strikes in the region. Flights from Lebanon's national carrier are taking off, demonstrating a degree of resilience in air transport infrastructure.

events.title: Saudi Arabia Restores Oil Pipeline to Full Capacity Post-Attack
events.desc: The East-West pipeline in Saudi Arabia has returned to pumping approximately 7 million barrels per day, indicating successful repair and restoration of critical energy infrastructure following recent attacks.

events.title: Hungarian Government Ministries Exposed in Data Breach
events.desc: Approximately 800 Hungarian government email addresses and passwords have been leaked online, affecting 12 out of 13 ministries. This breach reveals significant security vulnerabilities within sensitive government operations.

events.title: Iran Uses Sophisticated AI-Generated Videos for Propaganda
events.desc: AI-generated videos, described as 'highly sophisticated' propaganda, are being used to influence narratives related to the conflict involving Iran. Experts emphasize the power of this 'slopaganda'.

events.title: US-Iran Peace Talks Conclude Without Agreement
events.desc: High-level talks between the US and Iran in Pakistan ended without a deal, with both sides blaming each other. US Vice President JD Vance stated the US presented its 'final and best offer,' while Iran indicated no deal was expected at this initial meeting.

events.title: Houthi Missile Underscores Regional Pressure Amid Ceasefire
events.desc: The Houthis fired a missile, serving as a reminder of ongoing regional pressures even as a fragile US-Iran ceasefire holds. This action highlights the complex dynamics influencing the broader conflict.

events.title: Israel and Lebanon Officials to Meet for Peace Talks
events.desc: Officials from Israel and Lebanon are scheduled to meet for peace talks, following a period of heightened tensions and conflict. Lebanon's participation is contingent on a ceasefire being in place.

events.title: US Military Supports Israeli Air and Missile Defense
events.desc: During a recent conflict with Iran, the US military deployed regionally based air and missile defense assets to intercept Iranian missiles and drones, expending a significant portion of its missile interceptor stockpile.
